---
title: "Notes"
---

This site publishes a curated set of notes. The notes below are grouped loosely by topic to make the collection easier to scan.

## Data curation, databases, and software tools

| Note | Topics |
|---|---|
| [ACNC Registry data: Arrow version](published/acnc_registry_arrow.html) | Australia, Arrow |
| [Data curation and the data science workflow](published/import_sirca.html) | Data curation, Australia, ASX, SIRCA |
| [Data curation: The case of Call Reports](published/curate_call_reports.html) | Data curation, Polars, DuckDB |
| [Data collection (with spreadsheets)](published/spreadsheets.html) | Data curation, Spreadsheets |
| [Getting SEC EDGAR XBRL data](published/getting_dera_notes.html) | SEC, XBRL, EDGAR |
| [Responsive open-source software: Two examples from `dbplyr`](published/dbplyr-news.html) | Data curation, dbplyr, SQL, DuckDB |
| [Responsive open-source software: Two examples from `dbplyr`](published/window-functions.html) | dbplyr, SQL |
| [Shared code](published/shared_code.html) | Research, web data |
| [Why aren't more data people talking about ibis?](published/why_no_ibis_talk.html) | Python, Ibis, DuckDB, SQL |
| [Writing better SQL without writing SQL](published/ctes.html) | SQL, dbplyr |
| [SIRCA ASX End of Day (EOD) collection](published/sirca_eod.html) | Australia, SIRCA, ASX, CSV, Parquet |
| [SIRCA Mergers and Acquisitions collection](published/sirca_ma.html) | Australia, M&A, ASX, SIRCA, Parquet |
| [Converting lazy data frames into Parquet files](published/lazy_tbl_to_pq.html) | R, Parquet, db2pq, WRDS, Tidy Finance |
| [Converting lazy data frames into Parquet files (Python version)](db2pq_test/ibis_to_pq.html) | Python, Parquet, db2pq |
| [Benchmarking local PostgreSQL-to-Parquet export paths](db2pq_test/local_engine_benchmark.html) | PostgreSQL, Parquet, benchmarking |
| [Improving performance of SQLite data](published/convert_to_pq.html) | Tidy Finance, SQLite |

## Python, finance, and data workflows

| Note | Topics |
|---|---|
| [Ball and Brown (1968): Replication using Python Polars](published/bb68.html) | Accounting research, Replication, Python |
| [Data management ideas for researchers](published/data_mgt.html) | Python, Parquet, db2pq, WRDS |
| [Data management ideas for researchers (R version)](published/data_mgt_r.html) | R, Parquet, db2pq, WRDS |
| [Some benchmarks with `comp.g_secd`](published/g_secd.html) | SAS, WRDS, CRSP, Parquet, Python |
| [The best of both worlds: Using modern data frame libraries to create pandas data](published/dsf_polars.html) | WRDS, Polars, Ibis, pandas |
| [Using SAS to create pandas data](published/sas_to_pd.html) | SAS, pandas, wrds2pg |
| [Calculating betas using DuckDB](published/tidy_finance_betas.html) | Tidy Finance, DuckDB, WRDS, Finance |
| [Trading days per year (`crsp.dsf`)](published/trading_dates.html) | CRSP, WRDS |
| [Stock returns on Yahoo Finance](published/yahoo-returns.html) | Yahoo, finance |
| [Adding delisting returns to monthly data](published/delisting.html) | SAS, Stock returns, CRSP |

## Research methods, replication, and commentary

| Note | Topics |
|---|---|
| [Should Bao et al. (2020) be retracted?](published/bklyz.html) | Research methods, Machine learning |
| [Missing Form APs?](published/missing_form_aps.html) | Research methods, PCAOB, XBRL, SEC |
| [The elephant in the room: p-hacking and accounting research](published/elephants.html) | Research methods, p-hacking |
| [The Gino-Colada Affair](published/gino-colada.html) | Reproducibility, Research methods |
| [Reproducible data collection](published/repro_data.html) | Reproducibility, Research methods |
| [Does @Beardsley_2021 show anything?](published/tax_target.html) | Research methods |
| [Analysis of IPOs on the ASX](published/aus_ipos.html) | Australia, IPOs |

## R, graphics, and miscellaneous data notes

| Note | Topics |
|---|---|
| [A quick look at City of Melbourne bike data](published/bikes.html) | Melbourne, transport |
| [Data visualization challenge](published/data_viz_problem.html) | Data visualization, ggplot2 |
| [Making `plotnine` more 'Pythonic'](plotnine_test/plotnine_testone.html) | Python, plotnine, graphics |
| [Retail sales](published/retail-sales.html) | Retail, ABS, R |
| [The Retail Sales Data Set](ggsql_test/retail_sales.html) | Retail, ggsql, SQL, Visualization |
| [Defining winter and summer in Boston](published/bos-seasons.html) | Weather, Boston |
| [Defining winter and summer in Melbourne](published/weather.html) | Weather, Australia, Melbourne |
| [Defining winter and summer in Sydney](published/weather-syd.html) | Weather, Australia, Sydney |
| [Defining winter and summer in Oxford](published/oxon_weather.html) | Weather, Oxford, Python |
| [Sunrise and sunset times](published/sunrise.html) | Datetimes, Weather, Australia, Melbourne, Boston |
